summary: Vertical video. A re-post of the narrated USCIS 'apply online' PSA explaining how to register and get fingerprinted online, with a silhouette shot, a red-circled calendar date, a USCIS website screenshot, and an ARR end card under a full voiceover and caption text. On-screen and spoken text includes 'Did you know that if you are an alien', 'or more in the U.S.', 'Access USCIS online', 'and follow the step by step instructions', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: Did you know that if you are an alien; or more in the U.S.; Access USCIS online; and follow the step by step instructions; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
